CVE-2019-19010.title: Eval injection in the Math plugin of Limnoria (before 2019.11.09) ...
CVE-2019-19010.summary: Eval injection in the Math plugin of Limnoria (before 2019.11.09) and Supybot (through 2018-05-09) allows remote unprivileged attackers to disclose information or possibly have unspecified other impact via the calc and icalc IRC commands.
